title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JavaScript libraries for pulling and running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python library.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration enabling Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding backends with tool-calling support.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-like interface) with multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG, and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java client for Ollama offering synchronous/asynchronous APIs and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API with idiomatic Ruby syntax.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based CLI that adds parallel pulls, progress bars, and TUI model management on top of the official binary.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot replacement with inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder nodes for building RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-camunda
summary: Community extension embedding Ollama models directly into Camunda 8 worker tasks for low-latency inference.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches model layers and exposes Ollama as a reproducible CI service for integration tests.

title: ollama-observability
summary: Grafana + Prometheus stack pre-configured with Ollama metrics dashboard for GPU/CPU usage, tokens/sec, and queue depth.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake providing reproducible builds of Ollama and curated model derivations for declarative deployments.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Minimal Streamlit app showing how to build a RAG chatbot using Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that exposes Ollama models to servers with slash commands, moderation, and per-user quotas.

title: ollama-minecraft
summary: Spigot plugin bringing local LLM NPCs to Minecraft via Ollama, allowing conversational agents in-game.

title: ollama-llamafile
summary: Experimental adapter letting Ollama consume llamafile executables as portable model artifacts.

title: ollama-model-zoo
summary: Curated community registry of fine-tuned models compatible with Ollama, with CI validation and download stats.
